flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 15 pp at The College of Westchester vs the 2003–2007 baseline (32.0% vs 47.3%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at The College of Westchester rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($22.4k → $25.2k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at The College of Westchester fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at The College of Westchester rose 59% between 2021 and 2024 (50.0% → 79.3%).
